positive: An overhead view (flat lay) of a cozy picnic basket set in a meadow. The basket is filled with aesthetically pleasing items: a vintage book, a floral blanket, a small thermos, and a loaf of artisanal bread. The style is highly detailed editorial illustration, focusing on natural textures and warm, diffused sunlight. Soft focus, shallow depth of field, bohemian aesthetic, muted earth tones, golden hour lighting, hygge, photorealistic illustration, 8k, masterpiece.
